title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at JioMart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at JioMart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the JioMart family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About JioMart:
JioMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JioMart!
